verses.text: A father urges his children to hear instruction, recalling how he himself was taught as a tender son to keep his father's words and live. Wisdom is handed down through generations. The faith and counsel we received we owe to those who follow.

'Get wisdom, get understanding,' he pleads; love her, and she will keep and promote you, giving 'an ornament of grace' and 'a crown of glory.' Wisdom is worth pursuing above all. Those who prize and embrace her are honoured by her.

'Get wisdom, get understanding,' he pleads; love her, and she will keep and promote you, giving 'an ornament of grace' and 'a crown of glory.' Wisdom is worth pursuing above all. Those who prize and embrace her are honoured by her.

He has taught the way of wisdom, that the son's steps may not be straitened nor his run cause stumbling; 'take fast hold of instruction... keep her; for she is thy life.' Wisdom clears the path. Holding firmly to God's counsel is to hold onto life itself.

'Enter not into the path of the wicked'; avoid it, turn away, for they cannot sleep unless they have done evil, eating 'the bread of wickedness.' Avoid the very road of sin. The safest course is to keep clear of evil's company altogether.

'The path of the just is as the shining light, that shineth more and more unto the perfect day,' but the way of the wicked is darkness, and they stumble unknowing. Two paths grow ever clearer or darker. The righteous walk into increasing light.

'The path of the just is as the shining light, that shineth more and more unto the perfect day,' but the way of the wicked is darkness, and they stumble unknowing. Two paths grow ever clearer or darker. The righteous walk into increasing light.

Attend to wisdom's words and keep them in the heart, 'for they are life unto those that find them, and health to all their flesh.' God's words heal and sustain. To take Scripture to heart is medicine for the whole man.

Attend to wisdom's words and keep them in the heart, 'for they are life unto those that find them, and health to all their flesh.' God's words heal and sustain. To take Scripture to heart is medicine for the whole man.
'Keep thy heart with all diligence; for out of it are the issues of life.' Guard the inner fountain. As the heart is, so the whole life flows; nothing matters more than keeping it pure.
'Keep thy heart with all diligence; for out of it are the issues of life.' Guard the inner fountain. As the heart is, so the whole life flows; nothing matters more than keeping it pure.

Let the eyes look straight ahead, the feet be pondered, and turn neither to the right nor left, but keep from evil. Wisdom walks a steady, watchful path. A fixed aim and careful steps keep a man from wandering into sin.
